VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper with the exact title "Generative ai for de novo drug design: recent advances, challenges, and future directions" by Xuegong Liu, Qing Song, Yu Wei, and Yun Xu was found in any academic database or via web search. Similar but distinct papers exist (e.g., "A Survey of Generative AI for de novo Drug Design: New Frontiers in Molecule and Protein Generation" and "Generative artificial intelligence in drug discovery: basic framework, recent advances, challenges, and opportunities"), none matching this title or these authors.
LINK: NONE
